listings.notice_text: Foreclosure Sale TRUSTEE’S SALE OF 1414 FLAT IRON RD, MONTROSS, VA 22520 In execution of a certain Deed of Trust dated August 30, 2021, in the original principal amount of $293,584.00 recorded in the Clerk’s Office, Circuit Court for Westmoreland County, Virginia, in Book 947 at Page 174 as Instrument No. 210004231. The undersigned Substitute Trustee will offer for sale at public auction in the front of the Circuit Court building for Westmoreland County, 175 Polk Street, Montross, VA 22520, or any such temporary alternative Circuit Court location designated by the Judges of the Circuit Court, on June 5, 2026, at 9:30 AM, the property described in said Deed of Trust, located at the above address, and more particularly described as follows: ALL THAT CERTAIN PARCEL OF LAND SITUATE IN WASHINGTON MAGISTERIAL DISTRICT, WESTMORELAND COUNTY, VIRGINIA AND DESCRIBED BY METES AND BOUNDS AS LOT 1 CONTAINING AN AREA OF 1.623 ACRES UPON A PLAT OF SURVEY BY EDWARD G. HOLSINGER, C.L.S., DATED MARCH 12, 2007 AND RECORDED IN THE OFFICE OF THE CLERK OF THE CIRCUIT COURT OF WESTMORELAND COUNTY, VIRGINIA, AS PLAT SLIDE 538 (SEE DEED BOOK 756 AT PAGE 573). TOGETHER WITH AN EASEMENT OF INGRESS AND EGRESS 20 FEET IN WIDTH COMMENCING AT THE NORTHEASTERN CORNER OF LOT 1 AND PROCEEDING IN THE SOUTHWESTERLY DIRECTION ALONG THE EASTERN BOUNDARY OF LOT 1 AND ANOTHER PARCEL LABELED "RESIDUE" WHERE IT INTERSECTS WITH A 20 FOOT RIGHT OF WAY EASEMENT AND FURTHER TOGETHER WITH AN EASEMENT FOR INGRESS AND EGRESS 20 FEET IN WIDTH FORM SUCH INTERSECTION AND PROCEEDING IN A SOUTHWESTERLY DIRECTION TO IT TERMINUS AT STATE ROUTE #624 ALL OF WHICH IS DEPICTED UPON THE ABOVE REFERENCED PLAT OF SURVEY. FURTHER WITH THE FOLLOWING EASEMENTS: A 15 FOOT UTILITY EASEMENT AS SET FORTH ON THE ABOVE REFERENCED PLAT OF SURVEY. AND AN EASEMENT FOR PRIMARY AND RESERVE DRAIN FIELDS AND A 5 FOOT EASEMENT ASSOCIATED THEREWITH ALL OF WHICH IS DEPICTED ON THE ABOVE REFERENCED PLAT OF SURVEY. FURTHER WITH THE FOLLOWING EASEMENTS: A 15 FOOT UTILITY EASEMENT AS SET FORTH ON THE ABOVE REFERENCED PLAT OF SURVEY. AN EASEMENT FOR PRIMARY AND RESERVE DRAIN FIELDS AND A 5 FOOT EASEMENT ASSOCIATED THEREWITH ALL OF WHICH IS DEPICTED ON THE ABOVE REFERENCED PLAT OF SURVEY. TERMS OF SALE: ALL CASH. A bidder’s deposit of ten percent (10%) of the sale price or ten percent (10%) of the original principal balance of the subject Deed of Trust, whichever is lower, in the form of cash or certified funds payable to the Substitute Trustee must be present at the time of the sale. The balance of the purchase price will be due within fifteen (15) days of sale, otherwise Purchaser’s deposit may be forfeited to Trustee. Time is of the essence. If the sale is set aside for any reason, the Purchaser at the sale shall be entitled to a return of the deposit paid. The Purchaser may, if provided by the terms of the Trustee’s Memorandum of Foreclosure Sale, be entitled to a $50 cancellation fee from the Substitute Trustee, but shall have no further recourse against the Mortgagor, the Mortgagee or the Mortgagee’s attorney. A form copy of the Trustee’s memorandum of foreclosure sale and contract to purchase real property is available for viewing at www.aldridgepite.com. Additional terms, if any, to be announced at the sale and the Purchaser may be given the option to execute the contract of sale electronically. This is a communication from a debt collector and any information obtained will be used for that purpose. The sale is subject to seller confirmation. Substitute Trustee: Equity Trustees, LLC, 8100 Three Chopt Road, Suite 240, Richmond, VA 23229. If you have any questions or concerns, please contact the Virginia Pre-Sale Department of counsel for Equity Trustees, LLC at 301-961-6555, website: www.aldridgepite.com. VA-381755-1. RICHMOND COUNTY, VIRGINIA 2026-05-06

listings.address: 197 FT KING DR, COLONIAL BEACH, VA 22443
listings.deposit: A deposit of $20,153.10 or 10% of the sale price, whichever is lower, will be required of the successfu
listings.notice_text: Foreclosure Sale Trustee's Sale 197 FT KING DR, COLONIAL BEACH, VA 22443 (Parcel ID: 6B 4 K 5) Default having been made in the terms of a certain Deed of Trust dated 9/26/2022, in the original principal amount of $201,531.00 and recorded in the Clerk's Office of the Circuit Court of the Westmoreland County, Virginia on 9/27/2022, as Instrument No. 220003767, in Book 959, Page 1948, the undersigned Substitute Trustees will sell at public auction on 6/5/2026 at 3:00 PM, Front of building of the Circuit Court Building For Westmoreland County, 175 Polk Street, Montross, Virginia 22520, the property designated as 197 FT KING DR, COLONIAL BEACH, VA 22443. Lot 5, Block K, Section 4, Westmoreland Shores, as shown on a plat of said Section 4, Westmoreland Shores, dated 11 February 1957, made by Brooks and Barton, C.L.S., Richmond, Virginia, and duly recorded in the Office or the Clerk of the Circuit Court of Westmoreland County, Virginia, in Deed Book 154 at Page 560 and 561, to which plat reference is made for the metes and bounds of said lot. TERMS: CASH. A deposit of $20,153.10 or 10% of the sale price, whichever is lower, will be required of the successful bidder at time of sale. Prior to the sale, interested bidders will be required to register with and must present a bid deposit which may be held during the sale by the trustee. The bid deposit must be certified funds and/or cash, but no more than $9,900.00 of cash will be accepted. The successful bidder's deposit will be retained at the sale and applied to the sale price. If held by the trustee, all other bid deposits will be returned to the unsuccessful bidders. Settlement is to be made within 15 days. The successful bidder will be responsible for obtaining possession of the property, and for all costs and fees related to recording the Trustee's Deed, including the grantors tax. The successful bidder will be required to execute a Memorandum of Trustee's Sale, available for review upon request before the sale, outlining additional terms of sale and settlement. A Trustee's Deed will be prepared by Trustee's attorney at high bidder's expense. This is a communication from a debt collector. Vylla Solutions - Virginia, LLC, 283 Constitution Drive, Suite 102, Office B, Virginia Beach, VA 23462, File No. 26-39071, Tel: 888-313-1969 **********END OF ADVERTISEMENT********** RICHMOND COUNTY, VIRGINIA 2026-05-06

listings.address: 1.8341 ACRES, TOWN OF MONTROSS, WESTMORELAND COUNTY, VA In execution of a deed of trust from 345 Properties, LLC dated December 5, 2022, of record in the Clerk’s Office of the Circuit Court of Westmoreland County, Virginia in Deed Book 962, Page 192, the undersigned Substitute Trustee will offer for sale at public auction the following real estate, together with any improvements thereon, to-wit: TMP: 33-33 All that certain lot or parcel of land situated and being in the Town of Montross, Montross Magisterial District, Westmoreland County, Virginia, containing 1.8341 acres, as shown by plat of survey made by Richard B. Allison, Jr. and Associates, C.L.S., dated February 6, 1991, a copy of which is recorded in the Clerk’s Office of the Circuit Court, Westmoreland County, Virginia with the hereinafter referenced deed, reference to said survey is made for a complete and accurate description of the land hereby conveyed. Being the property conveyed to 345 Properties, LLC by Deed of record in the aforesaid Clerk’s Office in Deed Book 962 at Page 189. The undersigned Substitute Trustee reserves the right to reject all bids, extend the time to receive bids, withdraw the property from sale, waive or modify the deposit requirement and/or extend the period of time for settlement. SALE WILL BE HELD FRIDAY, APRIL 17, 2026, AT 11:30 A.M. AT THE FRONT STEPS OF CIRCUIT COURTHOUSE OF WESTMORELAND COUNTY, 175 POLK STREET, MONTROSS, VIRGINIA. TERMS: CASH. THE HIGH BIDDER SHALL BE REQUIRED TO DEPOSIT 10% OF BID BY CASH, CASHIER’S CHECK OR CERTIFIED FUNDS ON DAY OF SALE, CLOSING WITHIN THIRTY (30) DAYS. PROPERTY SOLD “AS IS”. SUBSTITUTE TRUSTEE WILL CONVEY BY SPECIAL WARRANTY DEED AND MAKES NO REPRESENTATIONS AS TO THE PROPERTY. SCOT A. KATONA, SUBSTITUTE TRUSTEE Dillard and Katona P. O. Box 356 Tappahannock, VA 22560
listings.city: Substitute Trustee Dillard And Katona P. O. Box 356 Tappahannock
